title: AWS MCP Server Reaches GA with Full API Coverage and IAM-Based Governance
summary: AWS has recently made its managed Model Context Protocol (MCP) server generally available, giving AI coding agents controlled access to AWS APIs, documentation, and operational workflows through a standard interface.
